  • Overview

Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Assignment
    Represents an assignment in a course.
    Course
    Represents a course in the classroom management system.
    CourseDAO
    Provides database operations related to courses.
    DatabaseConnection
    Handles the database connection for the classroom management system.
    EnrollmentDAO
    Provides database operations related to student course enrollments.
    Instructor
    Represents an instructor in the classroom management system.
    InstructorDAO
    Provides database operations related to instructors.
    InvalidDataException
    Custom exception used to handle invalid data in the system.
    Main
    Main Class used to run and test the classroom management system.s
    MainFrame
    Represents the main graphical user interface of the classroom management system.
    Manageable
    Interface that defines basic management operations.
    Person
    Class representing a person in the classroom management system.
    Student
    Represents a student in the classroom management system.
    StudentDAO
    Provides database operations related to students.
    Submission
    Represents a student's submission for an assignment.
    SummaryDAO
    Provides summary information from the database.
